era: 1991-2003. Grunge/Alternative. E=6 -- melodic weight, crystalline production, post-grunge reflection. Capitol Hill. Island Records.

theory_nodes.concept: Crystalline melodic grunge: heavy enough to feel physical, clean enough to feel beautiful. Post-grunge as genre evolution rather than commercial compromise.
theory_nodes.description: The melodic grunge niche: between noise and pop.

theory_nodes.concept: Jack Endino producing Truly: the raw producer meets the crystalline sound. Endino's directness disciplines; Truly's melody elevates. Productive tension.
theory_nodes.description: Fast Stories from Kid Coma 1995 -- Endino-Truly synthesis.

theory_nodes.concept: Second appearance as retrospective reappraisal. Final sixth returns revisit earlier entries with full-career context. E=6 as return energy -- reflective distance rather than first-impact force.

cross_references.relationship: First appearance. Formation documented. E=6. Capitol Hill. The original engine entry.
E=6 holds. Noise rock to melodic grunge. Capitol Hill continues. Abrasive to crystalline.
E=5. Post-Grunge. Capitol Hill. Melodic temperature drops.

sps_pair.pairing_note: E=9 -- TIES SPS MAXIMUM. Blood-curdling escalating shriek. Three consecutive E=9 begin here. E=6 + E=9 = E=15.

milestones: THREE CONSECUTIVE E=9 BEGIN IN SPS (302-304)
